methods.name: version_finder.git_executer.GitCommandExecutor.execute
documentation:
Execute a git command with retry logic and timeout.

Args:
    command: Git command and arguments as list
    retries: Number of retries attempted so far
    check: Whether to check return code and raise on error

Returns:
    Command output as bytes

Raises:
    GitCommandError: If the command fails after all retries

Version Finder CLI class.

modules.name: version_finder.core
documentation:
core.py
====================================
Core module for version_finder.
This module contains the core functionality for finding versions in a git repository.
It includes classes and functions for handling git operations and version finding.
The module is designed to work with git repositories and provides a user-friendly interface for
finding and comparing versions.

classes.name: version_finder.core.GitError
documentation: Base exception for git operations

classes.name: version_finder.core.InvalidGitRepository
documentation: Raised when the repository path is invalid

classes.name: version_finder.core.GitRepositoryNotClean
documentation: Raised when the repository has uncommitted changes

classes.name: version_finder.core.InvalidCommitError
documentation: Raised when the commit is invalid

classes.name: version_finder.core.InvalidSubmoduleError
documentation: Raised when the submodule is invalid

classes.name: version_finder.core.InvalidBranchError
documentation: Raised when the branch is invalid

classes.name: version_finder.core.VersionNotFoundError
documentation: Raised when version is not found in commits message

classes.name: version_finder.core.GitNotInstalledError
documentation: Raised when git is not installed

classes.name: version_finder.core.RepositoryNotTaskReady
documentation: Raised when the repository is not ready for task

documentation: A class to represent a git commit.

documentation: A class to represent a VersionFinder task.

documentation: Returns tasks sorted by index

classes.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the VersionFinder with a repository path and configuration.

Args:
    path: Path to the git repository. Uses current directory if None.
    config: Configuration settings for git operations.
    logger: Logger instance for logging operations.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.__has_remote
documentation: Check if the repository has any remotes configured.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.__validate_repository
documentation: Validate the git repository and its state.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.__load_repository_info
documentation: Load repository information including submodules and branches.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.__load_submodules
documentation: Load git submodules information.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.__fetch_repository
documentation: Fetch latest changes from remote repository.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.__load_branches
documentation: Load git branches information.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.__extract_version_from_message
documentation:
Extract version from commit message using various patterns.

Args:
    commit_message: The commit message to parse

Returns:
    Optional[str]: Extracted version or None if no version found

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.__is_clean_git_repo
documentation: Check if the git repository is clean.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.list_submodules
documentation: Get list of submodules.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.list_branches
documentation: Get list of branches.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.get_commit_info
documentation: Get detailed commit information.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.get_current_branch
documentation: Get current branch.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.has_branch
documentation: Check if a branch exists.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.update_repository
documentation:
Update the repository and its submodules to the specified branch.

Args:
    branch: Branch name to checkout.

Raises:
    GitCommandError: If update operations fail.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.__update_all_submodules
documentation: Update submodules recursively.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.find_commits_by_text
documentation:
Find commits in the specified branch that contain the given text in either title or description.

Args:
    text: Text to search for in commit messages (title and description).
    submodule: Optional submodule path to search in.

Returns:
    List of commit hashes.

Raises:
    GitCommandError: If the git command fails.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.get_commit_surrounding_versions
documentation:
Find the nearest version commits before and after the given commit.

Args:
    commit_sha: The commit SHA to get the surrounding version commits for.

Returns:
    List containing the previous and next version commit SHAs. Elements can be None.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.get_version_from_commit
documentation:
Get the version from the commit message.

Args:
    commit_sha: The commit SHA to get the version for.

Returns:
    str: The version from the commit message.

Raises:
    GitCommandError: If the commit does not exist or version cannot be extracted.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.has_commit
documentation:
Check if a commit exists in the repository.

Args:
    commit_sha: The commit SHA to check.

Returns:
    bool: True if the commit exists, False otherwise.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.submodule_has_commit
documentation:
Check if a commit exists in a submodule.

Args:
    submodule_path: The path to the submodule.
    commit_sha: The commit SHA to check.

Returns:
    bool: True if the commit exists in the submodule, False otherwise.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.get_first_commit_including_submodule_changes
documentation: Get the first commit that includes changes in the specified submodule.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.find_commit_by_version
documentation: Find the commit that indicates the specified version.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.get_submodule_commit_hash
documentation:
Get the submodule pointer from a commit.
That is, get the hash of the submodule at the time of the commit.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.get_commits_between_versions
documentation: Get the list of commits between two versions.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.get_parent_commit
documentation:
Get the parent commit of a given commit hash.

Args:
    commit: The commit hash to find the parent for
    submodule: Optional submodule path to look in

Returns:
    str: Parent commit hash, or original commit if no parent exists

Raises:
    RepositoryNotTaskReady: If repository is not ready

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.find_first_version_containing_commit
documentation:
Get the first version which includes the given commit.
If submodule is provided, get the first version which includes the given commit in the submodule.
If no version is found, return None.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.get_commit_sha_from_relative_string
documentation:
Get the commit SHA from a relative string.
For example, "HEAD~1" will return the SHA of the commit that is one commit before HEAD.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.get_task_api_functions
documentation: Get the list of API functions.

methods.name: version_finder.core.VersionFinder.get_task_api_functions_params
documentation: Get the list of API functions parameters.
A class to handle git repository operations and version finding.
